name: Oatmeal Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt and granulated sugar.
2. Stir in brown sugar. Mix well.
3. With a pastry blender, cut in shortening until evenly distributed.
4. Stir in oats and mix well.
5. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container.
6. Label as OATMEAL MIX and store in a cool, dry place.
7. Use within 10 to 12 weeks.
